description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a distinctive retro-futuristic design, featuring large, square ear cups in a combination of pink and white colors. The ear cups are thick and padded, likely providing comfort and sound isolation, and are connected by a wide, black, cushioned headband. The headband appears adjustable, with visible hinges and metallic connectors attaching it to the ear cups. The headphones have a robust, plastic exterior with metallic accents, and the overall build suggests durability and comfort for extended use. The branding is visible on the top of the headband, adding a touch of style and identity. These headphones are likely wireless, as there are no visible cables or ports.
description: A pair of large, square, pink and white over-ear headphones with a black cushioned headband and visible branding. The design is bold, retro, and likely wireless.
description_view_0: Front view showing both square ear cups and the arching black headband, highlighting the symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Side view of the left ear cup, displaying the pink exterior, metallic hinge, and branding on the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband arch.
description_view_3: Side view of the right ear cup, mirroring the left with visible branding and metallic hinge.
